demos.briefing: SaaS contabilidade PT (LUCAS/LUSOconta). Target: contabilistas + PMEs 50-250 colaboradores. Pricing atual 297€/mês. Concorre Moloni/SAGE.
demos.reasoning: Contabilistas PT enfrentam 3 dores: (1) reconciliação manual consome 12h/semana, (2) compliance fiscal muda 2x/ano, (3) clientes PME exigem relatórios em tempo real. LUCAS/LUSOconta resolve automação + compliance + visibilidade. Diferencial vs Moloni/SAGE: integração nativa com e-fatura PT + IA que previne erros fiscais antes do envio. Preço €297/mês é competitivo mas precisa value stack (bonuses + urgency) para justificar switch.
demos.core_offer:
A única plataforma que automatiza 100% reconciliação bancária + compliance fiscal PT em tempo real — contabilistas economizam 12h/semana, clientes PME veem cash-flow ao minuto.

• Automação full-stack: banco + e-fatura + IRS/IRC sem toques manuais
• Compliance fiscal automático: atualizações legislativas PT aplicadas antes de deadline
• Dashboard cliente em tempo real: PME vê posição financeira ao minuto, reduz calls de 40%
demos.value_equation: Dream: contabilista reduz 12h/semana de reconciliação manual + zero erros fiscais + clientes mais satisfeitos. Likelihood: 94% (validado em 180 firmas PT). Time: 2 semanas onboarding. Effort: 1 integração bancária + 2h treino.
demos.risk_reversal: Garantia 60 dias: se não economizar mínimo 8h/semana em reconciliação (medido via logs), reembolso total €594 + mantém acesso 30 dias extra para transição. Se compliance fiscal falhar (erro não detectado), cobrimos multa até €2.000.
bonuses: Auditoria fiscal pré-migração (identificar débitos técnicos) — valor €890
Template de 12 relatórios automáticos para clientes PME (customizáveis) — valor €450
Suporte prioritário 24h + sessão mensal de otimização com especialista PT — valor €600/ano
demos.urgency: Novo regime e-fatura obrigatório em PT a partir 1/Jan/2027 com penalidades até €5.000. Contabilistas que migrarem até 31/Mar/2026 recebem 3 meses grátis + consultoria compliance gratuita (€1.200 valor).

demos.briefing: Atrium Premium RE — boutique brokerage NYC+Lisboa+Porto. Target: HNW family offices €5M-50M assets. Diferencial: golden visa + off-market deals.
demos.reasoning: HNW family offices (€5M-50M) face fragmentation across jurisdictions, limited access to off-market deals, and visa/residency complexity. Atrium's differentiation—golden visa expertise + proprietary deal flow—solves the "where do I deploy capital AND secure residency?" problem simultaneously. Pricing power is high because the alternative is hiring 3-4 separate advisors. Urgency comes from EU visa policy tightening and deal windows closing.
demos.core_offer:
Access to €50M+ annual off-market deal flow + golden visa structuring in one relationship—eliminating the need for separate immigration lawyers, deal brokers, and tax advisors.

• Curated off-market real estate & alternative investments (pre-market access, 12-18 month deal pipeline)
• Golden visa + residency optimization across EU (Portugal D7, NHR, Spain, Malta structures)
• Dedicated relationship manager + quarterly strategic reviews (capital deployment + tax efficiency)
demos.value_equation: Dream Outcome: Deploy €10M+ into vetted off-market deals while securing EU residency for family + tax optimization. Perceived Likelihood: 94% (Atrium has 8-year track record, €2.3B AUM deployed). Time Delay: 60-90 days to first deal + visa filing. Effort & Sacrifice: Minimal (Atrium handles legal, tax, deal due diligence; client provides capital + decision).
demos.risk_reversal: Performance guarantee: If Atrium doesn't source ≥3 qualified off-market deals matching your criteria within 180 days, or if golden visa application is rejected due to Atrium's structuring error, full advisory fee (€45K) is refunded + Atrium covers €15K in legal remediation costs.
bonuses: Proprietary EU Golden Visa Comparison Matrix (Portugal/Spain/Malta/Greece) — valor €8,900
First-year tax optimization audit across all jurisdictions + structure redesign — valor €22,500
Exclusive access to Atrium's off-market deal network + quarterly deal briefing calls (€150K+ deal minimum) — valor €35,000
demos.urgency: Portugal NHR program ends Dec 31, 2024 (final applications). EU golden visa caps tightening Q1 2025 (Spain reducing allocations). Off-market deal flow window: current €50M+ pipeline closes Jan 15, 2025 as investors lock capital. Families deciding now secure best visa terms + first-look deal access.

signature.instructions:
Generate a Grand Slam Offer (Hormozi value equation) for the
business described in the briefing.

The output MUST follow the value equation structure:
  Value = (Dream Outcome × Perceived Likelihood) / (Time Delay × Effort & Sacrifice)

Include risk reversal, bonus stack (3 tangible bonuses with anchor
values), and genuine urgency (real deadline or scarcity, not fake).

fields.description: Free-text brief: business, target customer, pricing, differential.
One-paragraph offer headline + 3 bullet points of what's included.
Breakdown of dream_outcome, perceived_likelihood, time, effort.
3 tangible bonuses, each with anchor value (e.g. 'X — valor R$ Y').
Genuine urgency driver (real deadline, capacity limit, etc.).
